══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Grung — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14

REASONING: Finger of Death on Grung — Iron Concentration. 7d8+30 necrotic.

══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Grung — Iron Concentration --- HP: 48/67 | AC: 14

--- Lich --- HP: 135/135 | AC: 17 | Cond: [paralyzed]
